tools.name: stackforge
tools.summary: Agent-friendly project scaffolding for OSS apps, APIs, and CLIs
tools.caveat: HEAD formula: installs from source because packaged Homebrew release artifacts are not published yet.

tools.name: branchbrief
tools.summary: Turn branch changes into crisp review briefings
tools.caveat: HEAD formula draft for source installs; release tarball and checksum will be added once published.

tools.name: taskbrief
tools.summary: Parse product prompts into reviewable engineering task briefs
tools.caveat: HEAD formula draft for source installs while release archives are not available.

tools.name: proofdock
tools.summary: Collect and check proof for agent-built software releases
tools.caveat: HEAD formula draft; use for source validation until versioned release assets exist.

tools.name: envprobe
tools.summary: Probe local development environments before agents make assumptions
tools.caveat: HEAD formula draft for source installs only.

tools.name: worktreeguard
tools.summary: Keep agent work inside safe isolated Git worktrees
tools.caveat: HEAD formula draft; no binary release is claimed.
